calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-30-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James F. Costello (415-710-9381) of Law Offices of James F. Costello for Deirde Frontczak, plaintiff and moving party / Kristen A. Jensen (415-554-4615) of Office of the City Attorney for City and County of San Francisco, defendant opposing party

HEARING - Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: Court finds it did have jurisdiction and moving party provided no authority on point. Court will think about the Castillo case. PLAINTIFF DEIRDE FRONTCZAK'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT is denied. Defendant's counsel is to submit an order in compliance with CRC 3.1312 denying plaintiff's motion. Also, in the future plaintiff's counsel is to comply with CRC 1113(f). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Smith, Not reported (D501)

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-08-2013 Continued To Jan-30-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
PLAINTIFF DEIRDE FRONTCZAK's MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT - Transferred to Dept. 501 to be heard on January 30, 2013 at 9:30 am. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: LaVenna Ward, CSR # 7077 = (302/MJM)
